utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: Well , yes , it is kind have an unusual house .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: It has umm , three beautiful bedrooms and ah , no baths .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: But you know , the ocean is right there .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: Ah , oh , hang on a second . Come in , come in . All right , so think about it , and call me back .

utterances.text: Hi Phoebe Abott , I am your best friends daughter !
